targets.expr: label_replace((sum by (instance, uplink, transport) (rate(outline_ws_rust_probe_runs_total{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance",group=~"$group",probe!="standby_ws",result="error"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (instance, uplink, transport) (rate(outline_ws_rust_probe_runs_total{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance",group=~"$group",probe!="standby_ws"}[$__rate_interval])), 1e-9)), "instance_short", "$1", "instance", "^([^.]+).*")

label_replace((sum by (instance, uplink, transport) (rate(outline_ws_rust_probe_runs_total{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance",group=~"$group",probe="standby_ws",result="error"}[$__rate_interval])) / clamp_min(sum by (instance, uplink, transport) (rate(outline_ws_rust_probe_runs_total{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance",group=~"$group",probe="standby_ws"}[$__rate_interval])), 1e-9)), "instance_short", "$1", "instance", "^([^.]+).*")
